notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.
CP00-134 is synthetic-only, metadata-only, and Risk C scoped to RP02 terminal review and closeout readiness rows.
CP00-134 inherits CP00-133 terminal review question behavior without executing runtime workflows or writing state.

Risk registers, severity taxonomy, go/no-go verdicts, finding routing maps, human approval summaries, Claude review packets, closeout criteria, closeout notes, next dependencies, documentation updates, command reruns, review questions, security audit questions, missing-test questions, and UI-leak questions remain inert/reference-only.

PASS_WITH_FINDINGS requires adjudication, BLOCK prevents production_ready, finding routing does not execute, human approval summaries do not grant approval, Claude packets do not execute Claude, command reruns do not execute commands, and risk registers do not write risk state.

No runtime UI/API route, permission policy mutation, product/database write, idempotency persistence, lock acquisition, retry, rollback, compensation, external share/export, AI/analytics execution, LDIP implementation, or HRX split was added.
